ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., AL, NL) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season in which the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that played in the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Final score of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game in hours and minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score achieved by the team */,
  "walks_issued" INTEGER /* Total walks issued by the team */,
  "total_bases" INTEGER /* Total bases accumulated by the team */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Total strikeouts by the team's pitchers */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Total stolen bases by the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total losses by the team */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Average batting performance of the team */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage of the team */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage of the team */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage of the team */,
  "earned_run_average" REAL /* Earned run average of the team's pitchers */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Total home runs hit by the team */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Total doubles hit by the team */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Total triples hit by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "batting_average" REAL /* Batting average of the player */,
  "player_age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Batting and throwing handedness */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "current_team_since" TEXT /* Date the player joined the current team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Pitching Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_age" INTEGER /* Age of the coach */,
  "highest_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Summary of the coach's record */,
  "coaching_philosophy" TEXT /* Description of the coach's coaching philosophy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  "venue_opened" TEXT /* Date the venue opened */,
  "venue_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the venue's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game where attendance applies */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "ticket_sales" REAL /* Total ticket sales revenue from the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the venue's capacity that was filled */,
  "gate_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from gate sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., ankle sprain, hamstring strain) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the injury was reported */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of recovery */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
